pkgmetadata.longdescription: An extensible monad transformer library with uniform liftings, a fairly portable core, and option of explicit naming of liftings. See http:\/\/www.fceia.unr.edu.ar\/~mjj\/Monatron\/ for more information. The monad zipper allows modular composition of components with Monatron effects. It is a contribution of Bruno Oliveira and Tom Schrijvers. See http:\/\/www.cs.kuleuven.be\/~toms\/Haskell\/ for more information.
